_comment: Vercel Hobby plan caps cron at once-per-day. The REAL appointment-reminder cron runs every 5 min from .github/workflows/appointment-reminders.yml (GitHub Actions is free and unmetered). We keep a daily no-op here as a belt-and-braces backup in case GitHub Actions is ever down. If you upgrade to Vercel Pro, change this schedule back to */5 * * * * and you can delete the workflow.
